nah you also gain it on chaos mix
The reason why caro can regen furnace is because of chaos

4 chaos units : pure chaos realm effects
any combination of chaos and a single non-chaos realm : normal realm mastery for the non-chaos realm, unique chaos awakener effects based on the realm (tentacle arrangement and aliemus for chaos, crimson furnace and embryo generation on exalts for caro, critical bonuses for ultra)
any combination of 2 non-chaos realms : halved realm mastery effects + additional reduction effects based on realm (no initial tentacles for aequor, no passive crimson furnace generation for caro, all effects unrelated to tentacle damage or embryo fusion are halved during the ultra turn in ultra)
Yes all caro furnace gen that's not salvador is purely from end of fight if you don't have chaos in the team
wait then i dunno actually, never played a full caro
The more chaos you put in your caro team the more you regen per turn

how do the attack, def, constitution stats work
They buff your overall team's stats usually
consititution is the sum of all your awakers's cons
whereas defense and attack affect that awaker's cards
strong % is universal~ . Hence why the attack and defense stats on the main menu
its a calculation of your team comp
Attack and Defense are calculated a little differently than const
your main awaker stat takes priority and gets added a bit by the other awakers
So its not all of them added together.
This is prevent some low cost supports such as gdoll
You are gonna get biased info from me. Others would say shes ok/above average
